items.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war

items.description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. items.title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
items.description: The Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim.
